evals.prompt: Verify the jwt-migration branch before shipping
evals.expected_outcome: Claude runs the test suite (green), invokes /codex:playwright to drive the login flow against the dev server, invokes /agy:longctx for blast-radius scan, synthesizes a PASS/BLOCK gate. Stops if any step fails.

assertions.name: tests_first
assertions.description: test suite is run before any specialist invocation

assertions.name: playwright_for_ui
assertions.description: codex:playwright is invoked for the UI/login-flow change

assertions.name: blast_radius_scan
assertions.description: agy:longctx is invoked to scan for blast radius across untouched modules

assertions.name: gate_block_on_test_failure
assertions.description: if tests fail, Claude STOPS and reports — does not proceed to Steps 2-3

evals.prompt: Verify the backend-only refactor on the parser branch
evals.expected_outcome: Claude runs tests + agy:longctx (parser changes can ripple), but SKIPS codex:playwright (no UI change). Notes skipped step in report.

assertions.name: no_playwright
assertions.description: codex:playwright is NOT invoked for backend-only changes

assertions.name: blast_radius_still_run
assertions.description: agy:longctx still runs — parser refactor can ripple
